# Pafiso (TypeScript)

> TypeScript library for generating Paging, Filtering, and Sorting parameters for REST requests. Compatible with the [Pafiso .NET library](https://github.com/fuji97/pafiso).

This library provides a fluent builder API and direct class constructors for building search query parameters that serialize to a bracket-notation format (`filters[0][fields]=Name&filters[0][op]=Contains&...`).

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { search } from 'pafiso';

const queryString = search()
  .filter(f => f.field('Name').contains('Franco'))
  .filter(f => f.field('Age').greaterThan('20'))
  .sortBy(s => s.by('Name').asc())
  .page(1, 10)
  .toQueryString();
```

## Core Concepts

The library has four modules, each with a data class, a fluent builder, and a factory function:

- **Filter** (`filter()` / `FilterBuilder` / `Filter`): Filter conditions with field(s), operator, value, and case sensitivity. Multiple fields create an OR condition.
- **Sorting** (`sorting()` / `SortingBuilder` / `Sorting`): Sort by a property in ascending or descending order.
- **Paging** (`paging()` / `PagingBuilder` / `Paging`): Pagination via skip/take or page number/size.
- **SearchParameters** (`search()` / `SearchParametersBuilder` / `SearchParameters`): Combines filters, sortings, and paging into a single query specification.

## Filter Operators

Equals, NotEquals, GreaterThan, LessThan, GreaterThanOrEquals, LessThanOrEquals, Contains, NotContains, In, NotIn, Null, NotNull.

## Output Formats

All builders and data classes support:
- `toDictionary()` — `Record<string, string>`
- `toURLSearchParams()` — `URLSearchParams`
- `toQueryString()` — query string without leading `?`

## Parsing

```typescript
import { SearchParameters } from 'pafiso';

const params = SearchParameters.fromQueryString('filters[0][fields]=Name&filters[0][op]=Contains&filters[0][val]=test');
const params2 = SearchParameters.fromURLSearchParams(urlSearchParams);
const params3 = SearchParameters.fromDictionary(dict);
```

## Optional Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/fuji97/pafiso-ts)
- [Pafiso .NET Library](https://github.com/fuji97/pafiso)
- [npm Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/pafiso)
